itinerary.route: Pak Tam Chung to Kei Ling Ha Hoi
itinerary.mapNote: Sai Kung coastline. Volcanic hexagonal rock columns. Clear water bays. 400m.

itinerary.route: Kei Ling Ha to Gilwell Camp
itinerary.mapNote: Cross Sharp Peak and Nam Sheong. Remote Sai Kung interior. 350m.

itinerary.route: Gilwell Camp to Shui Long Wo
itinerary.mapNote: Traverse Maclehose Ridge. City skyline appears on horizon. 400m.

itinerary.route: Shui Long Wo to Lead Mine Pass
itinerary.mapNote: Cross the reservoirs catchment. Lion Rock visible ahead. 400m.

itinerary.route: Lead Mine Pass to Tuen Mun
itinerary.mapNote: Final section past Lead Mine Pass. Highest point at Needle Hill. 957m.

waypoints.name: Sharp Peak
waypoints.note: Sai Kung's dramatic rocky fin. Most iconic summit on the trail.

waypoints.name: High Island Reservoir
waypoints.note: Sea wall reservoir. Hexagonal volcanic columns. Geological wonder.

waypoints.name: Needle Hill
waypoints.note: Highest point on the trail. Views to Shenzhen skyline.

waypoints.name: Lion Rock
waypoints.note: Symbol of Hong Kong. Silhouette visible from downtown.
